description: 3GPP is the standards body that develops technical specifications for mobile telecommunications systems including 5G. Its website publishes standards documents and machine-readable API specifications that network vendors and operators can implement.
summary: 3GPP publishes multiple families of OpenAPI-based HTTP API specifications on 3gpp.org and forge.3gpp.org; they describe tenant/provider-hosted endpoints with optional or OAuth 2.0 client-credentials authentication, and no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on 3gpp.org.
